arts.sum: Maresca will not include the England defender, whom the 44-year-old confirmed is free to depart having played just 45 minutes this campaign.

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Frank Lampard's possible raid of Chelsea and Bournemouth's desperate search for a new striker.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Kvaratskhelia HOPE, Chilwell UPDATE, Duran COMPETITION
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Ben Chilwell and Jhon Duran. New West Ham United manager Graham Potter is seeking a reunion with Chelsea outcast Ben Chilwell as his first signing at the London Stadium, FootballTransfers can confirm .

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: 21-year-old bid 'rejected' after £11.7m Enzo Maresca decision
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly reject Wolverhampton Wanderers' first bid to sign the versatile Renato Veiga during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: First Chelsea transfer exit confirmed with more to follow after 'secret' Enzo Maresca deal
arts.sum: Chelsea youngster Alex Matos has completed a loan to League One side Oxford United until the end of the season. Matos, 20, joined Chelsea on a free in 2023 and arrived as a hugely exciting player but has struggled to make a breakthrough into the first team.
